description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode northwest on Division St. in San Francisco, CA scraped a parked car at low speed as it was pulling into a 
driveway, making contact with its left front bumper. There were no injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
